page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark data reveals a clear performance tradeoff. Single-core performance is relatively weak, with stress-ng single-core CPU, Geekbench single-core, and single-threaded gzip compression scoring in the bottom 10% to 25% of tested servers. However, the 32 dedicated physical cores compensate for this in parallel workloads, delivering average multi-core performance across stress-ng, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU tests. Memory bandwidth and database operations also perform in the middle tier, with Redis SET operations achieving 22.63 million operations per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g5.8xlarge offers a balanced resource density suitable for multi-threaded workloads that do not require high single-thread performance. The lack of local storage and GPU hardware makes it a cost-effective choice for standard enterprise applications. Recommended workloads include static web serving, multi-threaded software compilation, database operations, and medium-scale LLM inference tasks where parallel processing can leverage the 32 dedicated cores.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8163 x86_64 processor running at 2.5 GHz, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM. It lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, utilizing a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks indicate a distinct tradeoff: single-core performance is weak, ranking in the bottom 25%, whereas multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations consistently reach average mid-tier levels. This resource profile makes the instance a cost-effective option for parallelized workloads where single-thread speed is not critical. It is well-suited for multi-threaded software compilation, static web serving, database operations, and medium-scale LLM inference.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose instance delivering dedicated multi-core processing and average memory bandwidth for parallelized enterprise workloads.
